violations.description: Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a self closing door.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc… were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Flour residue in various locations indicate that more frequent detailed cleaning is needed.

Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. -Mop head was left in a ball that prevents it from drying. Bacteria will build in areas that remain moist at room temperature.
